I've uploaded a code repository in the directory /testbed. Consider the following PR description:

<pr_description>
Auto sorting items not inside Unsorted zone causes camera/view to stay centered on Unsorted Zone
### Describe the bug

When trying to sort items, I had the items to be sorted on the wrong tile that is not within the Unsorted Zone. I pressed (O) to sort all items, and the view became stuck within the center where the Unsorted Zone was when I started the action. I can still move, but the view does not follow.
One way I found to “fix” this bug in-game is by hauling items into the appropriate tile within the defined Unsorted Zone and then pressing (O) again to sort the items. This fixes the view and properly sorts the items.
After further testing, I found that this also happens when sorting items that are inside the Unsorted Zone but do not have any defined zones that fit them. For example, if there is only a Spare Parts zone but no Books or Default zone, it will sort planks correctly. However, if you try to sort a book without a specific Books or Default zone, the issue occurs even if the item is inside the Unsorted Zone.

### Attach save file

[Waverly-trimmed.tar.gz](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26713075/Waverly-trimmed.tar.gz)

### Steps to reproduce

The save file attached has already been prepared, so just follow the steps.

1. After loading into the save, press O to sort the items below the character.
2. The view should be centered onto the Unsorted Zone, but nothing happens. The character will still be on the tile and able to move, but the view will not center on the character.

"Fixing" it in-game:

1. Haul the items one step north, where the Unsorted Zone is.
2. Press O to sort the items.
3. The items should be sorted inside the refugee center within the prepared Default Zone and the camera will return to centering on the player again, even when moving.


### Expected behavior

Nothing should happen when trying to sort items when the items are inside the wrong tiles while having already set up the proper zones. There should only be an error popup or something similar.

### Screenshots

_No response_

### Versions and configuration

- OS: Android
    - OS Version: Manufacturer: ITEL; Model: itel A663LC; Release: 13; Incremental: GL-250516V1115; 
- Game Version: cdda-experimental-2026-04-13-1304 a518665-dirty [64-bit]
- Graphics Version: Tiles
- Game Language: System language []
- Mods loaded: [
    Dark Days Ahead [dda]
]

### Additional context

_No response_

  5251	
  5252	void multi_zone_activity_actor::do_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you )
  5253	{
  5254	    activity_id prior_act = get_type();
  5255	    bool activity_continues = simulate_turn( act, you, false );
  5256	    // If this activity still exists and was not successful or resulted in a new travel route, end it
  5257	    if( ( you.has_destination() || !activity_continues ) &&
  5258	        !act.is_null() && ( prior_act == you.activity.id() ) ) {
  5259	        // Nuke the current activity, leaving the backlog alone
  5260	        // No multi_zone_activity_actor functions will be called from this point, so `this` can be nullptr
  5261	        you.activity = player_activity();
  5262	    }
  5263	}
  5264	
  5265	bool multi_zone_activity_actor::simulate_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you,
  5266	        bool check_only )
  5267	{
  5268	    map &here = get_map();
  5269	    const tripoint_abs_ms abspos = here.get_abs( you.pos_bub() );
  5270	    // NOLINTNEXTLINE(performance-unnecessary-copy-initialization)
  5271	    player_activity current_act_copy = act;
  5272	    activity_id current_activity = current_act_copy.id();
  5273	
  5274	    // Prevent zero-move spinning from auto_resume backlog restore.
  5275	    if( !check_only ) {
  5276	        you.mod_moves( -1 );
  5277	    }
  5278	
  5279	    // Cache checked-and-failed sources so the move budget makes
  5280	    // progress across turns. Stored as a static because multi_zone
  5281	    // actors get cloned through the backlog (member state won't
  5282	    // persist). Fetch activities bypass it (dynamic requirement state).
  5283	    struct source_cache {
  5284	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> sources;
  5285	        size_t initial_count = 0;
  5286	        activity_id act_type = activity_id::NULL_ID();
  5287	        tripoint_abs_ms origin;
  5288	        character_id who;
  5289	        unsigned int zone_count = 0;
  5290	    };
  5291	    static source_cache cache;
  5292	
  5293	    const bool use_cache = !check_only && current_activity != ACT_FETCH_REQUIRED;
  5294	    const unsigned int cur_zone_count = zone_manager::get_manager().size();
  5295	
  5296	    bool cache_hit = use_cache &&
  5297	                     cache.act_type == current_activity &&
  5298	                     cache.origin == abspos &&
  5299	                     cache.who == you.getID() &&
  5300	                     cache.zone_count == cur_zone_count &&
  5301	                     ( !cache.sources.empty() || cache.initial_count == 0 );
  5302	
  5303	    std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> src_set;
  5304	    if( cache_hit ) {
  5305	        src_set = cache.sources;
  5306	    } else {
  5307	        src_set = multi_activity_locations( you );
  5308	        if( use_cache ) {
  5309	            cache.initial_count = src_set.size();
  5310	            cache.sources = src_set;
  5311	            cache.act_type = current_activity;
  5312	            cache.origin = abspos;
  5313	            cache.who = you.getID();
  5314	            cache.zone_count = cur_zone_count;
  5315	        }
  5316	    }
  5317	
  5318	    std::vector<tripoint_abs_ms> src_sorted = get_sorted_tiles_by_distance( abspos, src_set );
  5319	    // now loop through the work-spot tiles and judge whether its worth traveling to it yet
  5320	    // or if we need to fetch something first.
  5321	
  5322	    // check: if a fetch activity was assigned but there's nothing to fetch, end fetch activity (restoring backlog)
  5323	    // may cause infinite loop if something goes wrong
  5324	    // TODO: this could be moved to a multi_zone_activity_actor virtual function for post-location checking
  5325	    if( current_activity == ACT_FETCH_REQUIRED && src_sorted.empty() ) {
  5326	        // remind what you failed to fetch
  5327	        if( !check_only ) {
  5328	            fetch_required_activity_actor *as_fetch = static_cast<fetch_required_activity_actor *>( this );
  5329	            as_fetch->set_npc_fetch_history( you );
  5330	        }
  5331	        act.set_to_null();
  5332	        return true;
  5333	    }
  5334	
  5335	    requirement_failure_reasons req_fail_reason;
  5336	
  5337	    for( const tripoint_abs_ms &src : src_sorted ) {
  5338	        const tripoint_bub_ms &src_bub = here.get_bub( src );
  5339	        if( !check_only ) {
  5340	            if( !here.inbounds( src_bub ) ) {
  5341	                if( zone_sorting::sorter_out_of_bounds( you, current_activity ) ) {
  5342	                    // activity cancelled
  5343	                    return false;
  5344	                }
  5345	                //TODO: remove dummy argument
  5346	                zone_activity_stage dummy;
  5347	                // if route successful, activity cancelled
  5348	                if( !zone_sorting::route_to_destination( you, act, src_bub, dummy ) ) {
  5349	                    continue;
  5350	                } else {
  5351	                    return false;
  5352	                }
  5353	            }
  5354	        }
  5355	
  5356	        you.invalidate_crafting_inventory();
  5357	        // can we do the activity for position src_loc? if so, what stage of the activity?
  5358	        activity_reason_info act_info = multi_activity_can_do( you, src_bub );
  5359	
  5360	        // do we have requirements for this activity stage? if so, are they satisfied?
  5361	        // see activity_handlers.h enum for requirement_check_result
  5362	        req_fail_reason = requirement_failure_reasons();
  5363	        const requirement_check_result req_res = check_requirements( you, act_info, src, src_bub, src_set,
  5364	                check_only );
  5365	        if( req_res == requirement_check_result::RETURN_EARLY ) {
  5366	            // Fetch dispatched -- prune so we don't re-trigger it.
  5367	            if( use_cache ) {
  5368	                cache.sources.erase( src );
  5369	            }
  5370	            return false;
  5371	        }
  5372	        req_fail_reason.convert_requirement_check_result( req_res );
  5373	        if( req_fail_reason.check_skip_location() ) {
  5374	            if( use_cache ) {
  5375	                cache.sources.erase( src );
  5376	            }
  5377	            // Charge 1 move for expensive skips (zone/inventory scan).
  5378	            if( !check_only &&
  5379	                multi_activity_actor::activity_reason_continue( act_info.reason ) ) {
  5380	                you.mod_moves( -1 );
  5381	                if( you.get_moves() <= 0 ) {
  5382	                    break;
  5383	                }
  5384	            }
  5385	            continue;
  5386	        }
  5387	
  5388	        // route to destination if needed
  5389	        // this stores a destination_activity that is resumed via
  5390	        // can_resume_with_internal() in Character::assign_activity()
  5391	        std::optional<bool> route_result = multi_activity_actor::route(
  5392	                                               you, current_act_copy, src_bub, req_fail_reason, check_only );
  5393	        if( !route_result ) {
  5394	            if( use_cache ) {
  5395	                cache.sources.erase( src );
  5396	            }
  5397	            continue;
  5398	        }
  5399	        if( *route_result ) {
  5400	            // activity re-assigned OR route set; leave the multi-activity alone,
  5401	            // it won't process turns while auto-moving
  5402	            return true;
  5403	        }
  5404	
  5405	        // darkness is checked for in work locations
  5406	        // but there is a niche case (e.g. constructions) where the player is in darkness but the work location is not
  5407	        // this can create infinite loops
  5408	        // we can't check player.pos() for darkness before they've traveled to the work location
  5409	        // but now that the player is there, check
  5410	        if( !multi_activity_actor::can_do_in_dark( current_activity ) &&
  5411	            you.fine_detail_vision_mod( you.pos_bub() ) > LIGHT_AMBIENT_DIM ) {
  5412	            you.add_msg_player_or_npc( m_info, _( "It is too dark to work here." ),
  5413	                                       _( "%s aborts the %s activity because it's too dark to continue." ), you.disp_name(),
  5414	                                       current_activity.c_str() );
  5415	            return false;
  5416	        }
  5417	
  5418	        // do the activity!
  5419	        if( !check_only ) {
  5420	            if( !multi_activity_do( you, act_info, src, src_bub ) ) {

  5447	
  5448	/** Check if this activity can not be done immediately because it has some requirements */
  5449	requirement_check_result multi_zone_activity_actor::check_requirements( Character &you,
  5450	        activity_reason_info &act_info,
  5451	        const tripoint_abs_ms &src, const tripoint_bub_ms &src_loc,
  5452	        const std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> &src_set,
  5453	        bool check_only )
  5454	{
  5455	    map &here = get_map();
  5456	    zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
  5457	    const activity_id act_id = get_type();
  5458	
  5459	    bool &can_do_it = act_info.can_do;
  5460	    const do_activity_reason &reason = act_info.reason;
  5461	    const faction_id fac_id = you.get_faction_id();
  5462	    const zone_data *zone =
  5463	        mgr.get_zone_at( src, multi_activity_actor::get_zone_for_act( src_loc, mgr, act_id, fac_id ),
  5464	                         fac_id );
  5465	
  5466	    const bool needs_to_be_in_zone = multi_activity_actor::activity_must_be_in_zone( act_id, src_loc );
  5467	    // some activities require the target tile to be part of a zone.
  5468	    // tidy up activity doesn't - it wants things that may not be in a zone already - things that may have been left lying around.
  5469	    if( needs_to_be_in_zone && !zone ) {
  5470	        can_do_it = false;
  5471	        return requirement_check_result::SKIP_LOCATION_NO_ZONE;
  5472	    }
  5473	    // requirements were pre-satisfied
  5474	    if( can_do_it ) {
  5475	        return requirement_check_result::CAN_DO_LOCATION;
  5476	    }
  5477	    if( reason == do_activity_reason::REFUSES_THIS_WORK ) {
  5478	        you.add_msg_if_player( m_info,
  5479	                               _( "There's a human corpse there.  You wouldn't want to butcher it by accident." ) );
  5480	        if( you.is_npc() ) {
  5481	            add_msg_if_player_sees( you, m_info, _( "%s refuses to butcher a human corpse." ),
  5482	                                    you.disp_name() );
  5483	        }
  5484	    }
  5485	
  5486	    if( multi_activity_actor::activity_reason_quit( reason ) ) {
  5487	        return multi_activity_actor::requirement_fail( you, reason, act_id, zone );
  5488	    } else if( multi_activity_actor::activity_reason_continue( reason ) ) {
  5489	        // we can do it, but we need to fetch some stuff first
  5490	        // before we set the task to fetch components - is it even worth it? are the components anywhere?
  5491	        if( you.is_npc() ) {
  5492	            if( zone ) {
  5493	                add_msg_if_player_sees( you, m_info,
  5494	                                        _( "%s is trying to find necessary items to do the %s job on zone %s, reason %s" ),
  5495	                                        you.disp_name(), act_id.c_str(), zone->get_name(), do_activity_reason_string[int( reason )] );
  5496	            } else {
  5497	                add_msg_if_player_sees( you, m_info,
  5498	                                        _( "%s is trying to find necessary items to do the %s job, reason %s" ),
  5499	                                        you.disp_name(), act_id.c_str(), do_activity_reason_string[int( reason )] );
  5500	            }
  5501	        }
  5502	
  5503	        //set up loot and in-range locations
  5504	        std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> loot_zone_spots;
  5505	        std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> combined_spots;
  5506	        for( const tripoint_bub_ms &elem : mgr.get_point_set_loot(
  5507	                 you.pos_abs(), MAX_VIEW_DISTANCE, you.is_npc(), fac_id ) ) {
  5508	            loot_zone_spots.emplace_back( elem );
  5509	            combined_spots.emplace_back( elem );
  5510	        }
  5511	        for( const tripoint_bub_ms &elem : here.points_in_radius( src_loc, PICKUP_RANGE,
  5512	                PICKUP_RANGE ) ) {
  5513	            combined_spots.push_back( elem );
  5514	        }
  5515	        multi_activity_actor::add_basecamp_storage_to_loot_zone_list( mgr, src_loc, you, loot_zone_spots,
  5516	                combined_spots );
  5517	
  5518	        //begin requirements
  5519	        std::optional<requirement_id> activity_requirements = multi_activity_requirements( you, act_info,
  5520	                src_loc, zone );
  5521	        //end requirements
  5522	
  5523	        // requirement check was invalid, skip this location
  5524	        if( !activity_requirements || *activity_requirements == requirement_id::NULL_ID() ) {
  5525	            return requirement_check_result::SKIP_LOCATION;
  5526	        }
  5527	        // Remove the requirements already met
  5528	        requirement_id what_we_need = multi_activity_actor::remove_met_requirements( *activity_requirements,
  5529	                                      you );
  5530	
  5531	        bool tool_pickup = multi_activity_actor::activity_reason_picks_up_tools( reason );
  5532	        // is it even worth fetching anything if there isn't enough nearby?
  5533	        if( !multi_activity_actor::are_requirements_nearby( tool_pickup ? loot_zone_spots : combined_spots,
  5534	                what_we_need, you, act_id, tool_pickup, src_loc ) ) {
  5535	            const tripoint_bub_ms you_pos_bub = you.pos_bub();
  5536	            if( zone ) {

  5538	                                            _( "The required items are not available to complete the %s task at zone %s." ),
  5539	                                            act_id.c_str(), zone->get_name() ) );
  5540	            } else {
  5541	                add_msg_if_player_sees( you_pos_bub, m_info, string_format(
  5542	                                            _( "The required items are not available to complete the %s task." ),
  5543	                                            act_id.c_str() ) );
  5544	            }

  5548	                you.activity_vehicle_part_index = -1;
  5549	            }
  5550	            return requirement_check_result::SKIP_LOCATION;
  5551	        } else {
  5552	            if( !check_only ) {
  5553	                return fetch_requirements( you, what_we_need, act_info, src, src_loc, src_set );
  5554	            }
  5555	            return requirement_check_result::RETURN_EARLY;
  5556	        }
  5557	    }
  5558	    return requirement_check_result::SKIP_LOCATION_NO_MATCH;
  5559	}

 13388	void zone_activity_actor::do_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you )
 13389	{
 13390	    update_vehicle_zone_cache();
 13391	
 13392	    //Prepare activity stage
 13393	    if( stage == UNINIT ) {
 13394	        stage = INIT;
 13395	    }
 13396	    if( stage == INIT ) {
 13397	        stage_init( act, you );
 13398	    }
 13399	    if( stage == THINK ) {
 13400	        add_msg_debug( debugmode::DF_ACTIVITY,
 13401	                       "zone_sort do_turn: THINK pos=(%d,%d) has_dest=%d coords=%zu",
 13402	                       you.pos_bub().x(), you.pos_bub().y(),
 13403	                       you.has_destination() ? 1 : 0,
 13404	                       coord_set.size() );
 13405	        if( !stage_think( act, you ) ) {
 13406	            return;
 13407	        }
 13408	    }
 13409	    if( stage == DO ) {
 13410	        //to end this activity, THINK stage must resolve all zone tiles
 13411	        stage_do( act, you );
 13412	        return;
 13413	    }
 13414	    // If we got here without restarting the activity, it means we're done
 13415	    add_msg( m_info, _( "%s sorted out every item possible." ), you.disp_name( false, true ) );
 13416	    if( you.is_npc() ) {
 13417	        npc *guy = dynamic_cast<npc *>( &you );
 13418	        guy->revert_after_activity();
 13419	    }
 13420	    act.set_to_null();
 13421	}

 13438	void zone_sort_activity_actor::update_other_activity_items()
 13439	{
 13440	    other_activity_items.clear();
 13441	
 13442	    //store other activity items so they aren't sorted later
 13443	    for( const npc &guy : g->all_npcs() ) {
 13444	        if( !guy.activity.targets.empty() ) {
 13445	            for( const item_location &target : guy.activity.targets ) {
 13446	                other_activity_items.push_back( target );
 13447	            }
 13448	        }
 13449	    }
 13450	    for( const item_location &target : get_player_character().activity.targets ) {
 13451	        other_activity_items.push_back( target );
 13452	    }
 13453	}
 13454	
 13455	void zone_sort_activity_actor::do_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you )
 13456	{
 13457	    update_other_activity_items();
 13458	    // Save viewport state before base call. For NPCs, revert_after_activity()
 13459	    // replaces the activity and destroys this actor before returning.
 13460	    const bool had_viewport = viewport_was_active;
 13461	    const int saved_zoom = viewport_saved_zoom;
 13462	    zone_activity_actor::do_turn( act, you );
 13463	
 13464	    // True completion: activity nulled AND no auto-move destination pending.
 13465	    // route_to_destination sets destination before nulling; true end does not.
 13466	    // Use saved locals since this may be destroyed.
 13467	    if( act.is_null() && !you.has_destination() && had_viewport ) {
 13468	        if( !test_mode ) {
 13469	            g->set_zoom( saved_zoom );
 13470	            g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
 13471	        }
 13472	        if( you.is_avatar() ) {
 13473	            you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport = {};
 13474	        }
 13475	    }
 13476	}
 13477	
 13478	void zone_sort_activity_actor::canceled( player_activity &, Character &you )
 13479	{
 13480	    restore_viewport( you );
 13481	}
 13482	
 13483	void zone_sort_activity_actor::restore_viewport( Character &you )
 13484	{
 13485	    if( !viewport_was_active || !you.is_avatar() ) {
 13486	        return;
 13487	    }
 13488	    if( !test_mode ) {
 13489	        g->set_zoom( viewport_saved_zoom );
 13490	        g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
 13491	    }
 13492	    you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport = {};
 13493	    viewport_was_active = false;
 13494	}
 13495	
 13496	void zone_sort_activity_actor::stage_init( player_activity &, Character &you )
 13497	{
 13498	    zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
 13499	    mgr.cache_avatar_location();
 13500	    coord_set.clear();
 13501	    unreachable_sources.clear();
 13502	    const faction_id fac = you.get_faction_id();
 13503	    const bool skip_personal = !you.is_avatar() && mgr.has_personal_zones();
 13504	    for( const tripoint_abs_ms &p :
 13505	         mgr.get_near( zone_type_LOOT_UNSORTED, you.pos_abs(), MAX_VIEW_DISTANCE, nullptr, fac ) ) {
 13506	        if( skip_personal && !mgr.has_nonpersonal( zone_type_LOOT_UNSORTED, p, fac ) ) {
 13507	            continue;
 13508	        }
 13509	        coord_set.insert( p );
 13510	    }
 13511	
 13512	    if( you.is_avatar() && !coord_set.empty() ) {
 13513	        viewport_was_active = true;
 13514	        viewport_saved_zoom = g->get_zoom();
 13515	
 13516	        zone_sorting::viewport_bbox bbox = zone_sorting::calc_zone_bbox( coord_set );
 13517	        int target = zone_sorting::calc_target_zoom(
 13518	                         bbox.width(), bbox.height(),
 13519	                         TERRAIN_WINDOW_WIDTH, TERRAIN_WINDOW_HEIGHT,
 13520	                         viewport_saved_zoom, viewport_saved_zoom );
 13521	
 13522	        avatar::zone_sort_viewport_t &vp = you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport;
 13523	        vp.active = true;
 13524	        vp.center = bbox.centroid;
 13525	        vp.target_zoom = target;
 13526	        vp.bbox_min = bbox.min_corner;
 13527	        vp.bbox_max = bbox.max_corner;
 13528	        if( !test_mode ) {
 13529	            g->set_zoom( target );
 13530	            g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
 13531	        }
 13532	    }
 13533	
 13534	    stage = THINK;
 13535	}

 13570	    // Sort sources by A* route distance. Pre-sort by Chebyshev (lower bound),
 13571	    // compute A* lazily, stop when chebyshev > best_route + 1.
 13572	    // Tiles past the cutoff are appended in Chebyshev order as fallback.
 13573	    std::vector<std::pair<int, tripoint_abs_ms>> candidates;
 13574	    candidates.reserve( coord_set.size() );

 13580	    }

 13583	        return a.first < b.first;
 13584	    } );
 13585	
 13586	    std::vector<std::pair<int, tripoint_abs_ms>> computed;
 13587	    computed.reserve( candidates.size() );
 13588	    std::vector<tripoint_abs_ms> oob_tiles; // out-of-bounds, handled by iteration loop
 13589	    int best_route = INT_MAX;
 13590	    size_t cutoff = candidates.size();
 13591	
 13592	    for( size_t i = 0; i < candidates.size(); i++ ) {
 13593	        const int cheb = candidates[i].first;
 13594	        if( best_route != INT_MAX && cheb > best_route + 1 ) {
 13595	            cutoff = i;
 13596	            break;
 13597	        }
 13598	        const tripoint_bub_ms p_bub = here.get_bub( candidates[i].second );
 13599	        if( !here.inbounds( p_bub ) ) {
 13600	            // Skip OOB tiles here - route_with_grab can't clip them.
 13601	            // The iteration loop's !inbounds() handler will route closer.
 13602	            oob_tiles.emplace_back( candidates[i].second );
 13603	            continue;
 13604	        }
 13605	        if( cheb <= 1 ) {
 13606	            // Already adjacent - no pathfinding needed
 13607	            computed.emplace_back( 0, candidates[i].second );
 13608	            best_route = 0;
 13609	        } else {
 13610	            const int dist = zone_sorting::route_length( you, p_bub );
 13611	            // Budget: each route probe costs 1 move to prevent unbounded
 13612	            // A* work in a single frame. Charged before the INT_MAX check
 13613	            // because unreachable probes explore the full search space.
 13614	            you.mod_moves( -1 );
 13615	            if( you.get_moves() <= 0 ) {
 13616	                if( dist != INT_MAX ) {
 13617	                    computed.emplace_back( dist, candidates[i].second );
 13618	                } else {
 13619	                    unreachable_sources.emplace( candidates[i].second );
 13620	                }
 13621	                cutoff = i + 1;
 13622	                break;
 13623	            }
 13624	            if( dist == INT_MAX ) {
 13625	                unreachable_sources.emplace( candidates[i].second );
 13626	                continue;
 13627	            }
 13628	            computed.emplace_back( dist, candidates[i].second );
 13629	            best_route = std::min( best_route, dist );
 13630	        }
 13631	    }
 13632	
 13633	    // Sort the computed portion by actual route distance
 13634	    std::sort( computed.begin(), computed.end(),
 13635	    []( const std::pair<int, tripoint_abs_ms> &a, const std::pair<int, tripoint_abs_ms> &b ) {
 13636	        return a.first < b.first;
 13637	    } );
 13638	
 13639	    // Build final list: route-sorted, then remaining in Chebyshev order, then OOB tiles
 13640	    std::vector<tripoint_abs_ms> src_sorted;
 13641	    src_sorted.reserve( candidates.size() );
 13642	    for( const auto &entry : computed ) {
 13643	        src_sorted.emplace_back( entry.second );
 13644	    }
 13645	    for( size_t i = cutoff; i < candidates.size(); i++ ) {
 13646	        if( !unreachable_sources.count( candidates[i].second ) ) {
 13647	            src_sorted.emplace_back( candidates[i].second );
 13648	        }
 13649	    }
 13650	    for( const tripoint_abs_ms &p : oob_tiles ) {
 13651	        src_sorted.emplace_back( p );
 13652	    }
 13653	
 13654	    // iterate over zone positions and look for items to move
 13655	    for( const tripoint_abs_ms &src : src_sorted ) {
 13656	        placement = src;
 13657	
 13658	        const tripoint_bub_ms src_bub = here.get_bub( src );
 13659	        if( !here.inbounds( src_bub ) ) {
 13660	            if( zone_sorting::sorter_out_of_bounds( you, zone_sort_activity_actor() ) ) {
 13661	                return false;
 13662	            }
 13663	            if( !zone_sorting::route_to_destination( you, act, src_bub, stage ) ) {
 13664	                unreachable_sources.emplace( src );
 13665	                continue;
 13666	            }
 13667	            return false;
 13668	        }
 13669	
 13670	        bool ignore_contents = zone_sorting::ignore_contents( you, src );
 13671	
 13672	        if( zone_sorting::ignore_zone_position( you, src, ignore_contents ) ) {
 13673	            coord_set.erase( src );
 13674	            continue;
 13675	        }
 13676	
 13677	        zone_sorting::unload_sort_options zone_unload_options = zone_sorting::set_unload_options( you, src,
 13678	                true );
 13679	
 13680	        const zone_sorting::zone_items items = zone_sorting::populate_items( src_bub );
 13681	
 13682	        // check if there is valid destination for any item of the tile
 13683	        bool pickup_failure;
 13684	        bool spillable_skipped = false;
 13685	        bool has_items_to_work_on = zone_sorting::has_items_to_sort( you, src, zone_unload_options,
 13686	                                    other_activity_items, items, &pickup_failure, &spillable_skipped );
 13687	
 13688	        if( pickup_failure && !pickup_failure_reported ) {
 13689	            pickup_failure_reported = true;
 13690	            add_msg_if_player_sees( you,
 13691	                                    _( "At least one item to be sorted is too large/heavy for %s to sort.  "
 13692	                                       "Emptying the inventory and freeing up the hands will allow for more efficient sorting." ),
 13693	                                    you.disp_name() );
 13694	        }
 13695	
 13696	        if( spillable_skipped && !spillable_skip_reported ) {
 13697	            spillable_skip_reported = true;
 13698	            you.add_msg_if_player( m_info,
 13699	                                   _( "Some open containers were not sorted to avoid spilling." ) );
 13700	        }
 13701	
 13702	        if( !has_items_to_work_on ) {
 13703	            coord_set.erase( src );
 13704	            continue;
 13705	        }
 13706	
 13707	        bool is_adjacent_or_closer = square_dist( you.pos_bub(), src_bub ) <= 1;
 13708	        if( !is_adjacent_or_closer ) {
 13709	            add_msg_debug( debugmode::DF_ACTIVITY,
 13710	                           "zone_sort THINK: routing to source (%d,%d,%d) from (%d,%d)",
 13711	                           src.x(), src.y(), src.z(),
 13712	                           you.pos_bub().x(), you.pos_bub().y() );
 13713	            // Route to source. Can't skip: post-cutoff fallback tiles weren't pre-evaluated by route_length.
 13714	            if( !zone_sorting::route_to_destination( you, act, src_bub, stage ) ) {
 13715	                add_msg_debug( debugmode::DF_ACTIVITY,
 13716	                               "zone_sort THINK: route to source FAILED, trying next" );
 13717	                continue;
 13718	            }
 13719	            return false;
 13720	        }
 13721	        add_msg_debug( debugmode::DF_ACTIVITY,
 13722	                       "zone_sort THINK: adjacent to source (%d,%d,%d), entering DO",
 13723	                       src.x(), src.y(), src.z() );
 13724	        stage = DO;
 13725	        break;
 13726	    }
 13727	    if( stage != DO && !coord_set.empty() ) {
 13728	        // Remaining entries are filtered by unreachable_sources, have
 13729	        // full destinations, or were past the route probe cutoff.
 13730	        // Clear so the activity ends cleanly instead of re-scanning.
 13731	        coord_set.clear();
 13732	    }
 13733	    return true;
 13734	}
 13735	
 13736	void zone_sort_activity_actor::return_items_to_source( Character &you,
 13737	        const tripoint_bub_ms &src_bub )
 13738	{
 13739	    // Purge stale item_locations (can expire if items merged during multi-turn pickup)
 13740	    auto stale = std::remove_if( picked_up_stuff.begin(), picked_up_stuff.end(),

  7195	void Character::abort_automove()
  7196	{
  7197	    // Restore zone sort viewport lock state before clearing destination.
  7198	    // The actor in destination_activity has the authoritative saved_zoom.
  7199	    const bool had_visual_lock = is_avatar() && as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport.active;
  7200	    const player_activity &dest = peek_destination_activity();
  7201	    if( !dest.is_null() && dest.id() == ACT_MOVE_LOOT ) {
  7202	        if( const auto *a = dynamic_cast<const zone_sort_activity_actor *>(
  7203	                                dest.actor.get() ) ) {
  7204	            if( a->viewport_was_active || had_visual_lock ) {
  7205	                if( !test_mode ) {
  7206	                    g->set_zoom( a->viewport_saved_zoom );
  7207	                    g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
  7208	                }
  7209	            }
  7210	        }
  7211	    }
  7212	    if( had_visual_lock ) {
  7213	        as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport = {};
  7214	    }
  7215	
  7216	    clear_destination();
  7217	    if( g->overmap_data.fast_traveling && is_avatar() ) {
  7218	        ui::omap::force_quit();
  7219	    }
  7220	}

  6435	void game::try_activate_zone_sort_viewport()
  6436	{
  6437	    if( u.zone_sort_viewport.active ) {
  6438	        return;  // already active
  6439	    }
  6440	    if( !u.is_avatar() ) {
  6441	        return;
  6442	    }
  6443	
  6444	    const zone_sort_activity_actor *actor = nullptr;
  6445	
  6446	    if( u.activity && u.activity.id() == ACT_MOVE_LOOT ) {
  6447	        actor = dynamic_cast<const zone_sort_activity_actor *>( u.activity.actor.get() );
  6448	    }
  6449	    if( !actor ) {
  6450	        const player_activity &dest = u.peek_destination_activity();
  6451	        if( !dest.is_null() && dest.id() == ACT_MOVE_LOOT ) {
  6452	            actor = dynamic_cast<const zone_sort_activity_actor *>( dest.actor.get() );
  6453	        }
  6454	    }
  6455	
  6456	    if( !actor || !actor->viewport_was_active ) {
  6457	        return;
  6458	    }
  6459	
  6460	    std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> all_tiles = actor->get_coord_set();
  6461	    for( const tripoint_abs_ms &d : actor->get_dropoff_coords() ) {
  6462	        all_tiles.insert( d );
  6463	    }
  6464	    if( all_tiles.empty() ) {
  6465	        return;
  6466	    }
  6467	
  6468	    zone_sorting::viewport_bbox bbox = zone_sorting::calc_zone_bbox( all_tiles );
  6469	    int target = zone_sorting::calc_target_zoom(
  6470	                     bbox.width(), bbox.height(),
  6471	                     TERRAIN_WINDOW_WIDTH, TERRAIN_WINDOW_HEIGHT,
  6472	                     get_zoom(), actor->viewport_saved_zoom );
  6473	
  6474	    u.zone_sort_viewport.active = true;
  6475	    u.zone_sort_viewport.center = bbox.centroid;
  6476	    u.zone_sort_viewport.target_zoom = target;
  6477	    u.zone_sort_viewport.bbox_min = bbox.min_corner;
  6478	    u.zone_sort_viewport.bbox_max = bbox.max_corner;
  6479	    if( !test_mode ) {
  6480	        set_zoom( target );
  6481	        mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
  6482	    }
  6483	}

   760	    // If we didn't pick up a whole stack, put the remainder back where it came from.
   761	    if( leftovers.charges > 0 ) {
   762	        if( vpr_src ) {
   763	            if( !vpr_src->vehicle().add_item( here, vpr_src->part(), leftovers ) ) {
   764	                debugmsg( "SortLoot: Source vehicle failed to receive leftover charges." );

   771	
   772	namespace zone_sorting
   773	{
   774	
   775	// Cache routes computed by route_length() for reuse by route_to_destination().
   776	// Avoids recomputing the same A* when the sorter probes route distance and
   777	// then immediately routes to the same destination.
   778	namespace
   779	{
   780	struct zone_route_cache {
   781	    static constexpr size_t max_entries = 200;
   782	
   783	    tripoint_bub_ms start;
   784	    object_type grab_type = object_type::NONE;
   785	    tripoint_rel_ms grab_point;
   786	    int arm_str = 0;
   787	    units::mass veh_mass = 0_gram;
   788	    // destination -> route. Empty route means unreachable.
   789	    std::unordered_map<tripoint_bub_ms, std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms>> entries;
   790	    // FIFO eviction order -- front is oldest.
   791	    std::deque<tripoint_bub_ms> insertion_order;
   792	    bool initialized = false;
   793	
   794	    void ensure_valid( const Character &who ) {
   795	        object_type gt = object_type::NONE;
   796	        tripoint_rel_ms gp;
   797	        int cur_arm_str = 0;
   798	        units::mass cur_veh_mass = 0_gram;
   799	        if( who.is_avatar() ) {
   800	            gt = who.as_avatar()->get_grab_type();
   801	            gp = who.as_avatar()->grab_point;
   802	            if( gt == object_type::VEHICLE ) {
   803	                map &here = get_map();
   804	                const tripoint_bub_ms veh_pos = who.pos_bub() + gp;
   805	                const optional_vpart_position ovp = here.veh_at( veh_pos );
   806	                if( ovp && ovp->vehicle().get_points().size() == 1 ) {
   807	                    cur_arm_str = who.get_arm_str();
   808	                    cur_veh_mass = ovp->vehicle().total_mass( here );
   809	                }
   810	            }
   811	        }
   812	        if( !initialized || start != who.pos_bub() || grab_type != gt ||
   813	            grab_point != gp || arm_str != cur_arm_str || veh_mass != cur_veh_mass ) {
   814	            start = who.pos_bub();
   815	            grab_type = gt;
   816	            grab_point = gp;
   817	            arm_str = cur_arm_str;
   818	            veh_mass = cur_veh_mass;
   819	            entries.clear();
   820	            insertion_order.clear();
   821	            initialized = true;
   822	        }
   823	    }
   824	
   825	    const std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> *find( const tripoint_bub_ms &dest ) const {
   826	        auto it = entries.find( dest );
   827	        if( it != entries.end() ) {
   828	            return &it->second;
   829	        }
   830	        return nullptr;
   831	    }
   832	
   833	    void store( const tripoint_bub_ms &dest, std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> route ) {
   834	        auto it = entries.find( dest );
   835	        if( it != entries.end() ) {
   836	            it->second = std::move( route );
   837	            return;
   838	        }
   839	        while( entries.size() >= max_entries && !insertion_order.empty() ) {
   840	            entries.erase( insertion_order.front() );
   841	            insertion_order.pop_front();
   842	        }
   843	        entries.emplace( dest, std::move( route ) );
   844	        insertion_order.push_back( dest );
   845	    }
   846	};
   847	
   848	zone_route_cache g_route_cache;
   849	} // namespace
   850	
   851	bool route_to_destination( Character &you, player_activity &act,
   852	                           const tripoint_bub_ms &dest, zone_activity_stage &stage )
   853	{
   854	    map &here = get_map();
   855	    std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> route;
   856	
   857	    // Check if route_length() already computed a path for this destination.
   858	    g_route_cache.ensure_valid( you );
   859	    bool used_grab_routing = false;
   860	    bool from_cache = false;
   861	    if( const std::vector<tripoint_bub_ms> *cached = g_route_cache.find( dest ) ) {
   862	        if( !cached->empty() ) {
   863	            route = *cached;
   864	            from_cache = true;
   865	            used_grab_routing = ( you.is_avatar() &&
   866	                                  you.as_avatar()->get_grab_type() == object_type::VEHICLE );
   867	        }
   868	    }
   869	
   870	    if( route.empty() && !from_cache ) {
   871	        // Use grab-aware A* when dragging a single-tile vehicle - searches over
   872	        // (position, grab_direction) state so both player and cart can move.
   873	        if( has_grabbed_single_tile_vehicle( you, here ) ) {
   874	            // Single-tile vehicle: use grab-aware A*. If no path found,
   875	            // treat as unreachable (don't fall back to player-only routing
   876	            // which would cause cart collisions).
   877	            used_grab_routing = true;
   878	            route = route_with_grab( here, you, pathfinding_target::adjacent( dest ) );
   879	        } else {
   880	            route = here.route( you, pathfinding_target::adjacent( dest ) );
   881	        }
   882	    }
   883	
   884	    add_msg_debug( debugmode::DF_ACTIVITY,
   885	                   "route_to_dest: dest=(%d,%d) %s route_len=%zu %s",

   906	bool sort_skip_item( Character &you, const item *it,
   907	                     const std::vector<item_location> &other_activity_items,
   908	                     bool ignore_favorite, const tripoint_abs_ms &src,
   909	                     bool *spillable_skipped )
   910	{
   911	    const zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
   912	
   913	    // skip unpickable liquid
   914	    if( !it->made_of_from_type( phase_id::SOLID ) ) {
   915	        return true;
   916	    }
   917	
   918	    // skip nonempty spillable containers -- picking them up triggers the
   919	    // interactive liquid dialog, which is inappropriate during automated
   920	    // sorting.  Normal pickup also refuses these (pickup.cpp, ACT_INSERT_ITEM).
   921	    if( it->is_bucket_nonempty() ) {
   922	        if( spillable_skipped ) {
   923	            *spillable_skipped = true;
   924	        }
   925	        return true;
   926	    }
   927	
   928	    // don't steal disassembly in progress
   929	    if( it->has_var( "activity_var" ) ) {
   930	        return true;
   931	    }
   932	
   933	    // don't steal items from other activities, e.g. crafts in progress
   934	    if( std::find_if( other_activity_items.begin(), other_activity_items.end(),
   935	    [&it]( const item_location & activity_it ) {
   936	    return activity_it.get_item() == it;
   937	    } ) != other_activity_items.end() ) {
   938	        return true;
   939	    }

   969	
   970	unload_sort_options set_unload_options( Character &you, const tripoint_abs_ms &src,
   971	                                        bool use_zone_type )
   972	{
   973	    const zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
   974	    unload_sort_options zone_sort_options;
   975	
   976	    std::vector<zone_data const *> const zones = mgr.get_zones_at( src, zone_type_UNLOAD_ALL,
   977	            _fac_id( you ) );
   978	
   979	    // set rules from all zones in stack
   980	    for( zone_data const *zone : zones ) {
   981	        if( !zone->get_enabled() ) {
   982	            continue;
   983	        };
   984	        unload_options const &options = dynamic_cast<const unload_options &>( zone->get_options() );
   985	        zone_sort_options.unload_molle |= options.unload_molle();
   986	        zone_sort_options.unload_mods |= options.unload_mods();
   987	        zone_sort_options.unload_always |= options.unload_always();
   988	
   989	        zone_sort_options.unload_sparse_only |= options.unload_sparse_only();
   990	        if( options.unload_sparse_only() &&
   991	            options.unload_sparse_threshold() > zone_sort_options.unload_sparse_threshold ) {
   992	            zone_sort_options.unload_sparse_threshold = options.unload_sparse_threshold();
   993	        }
   994	
   995	        if( use_zone_type ) {
   996	            zone_sort_options.ignore_favorite |= zone->get_type() == zone_type_LOOT_IGNORE_FAVORITES;
   997	            zone_sort_options.unload_all |= zone->get_type() == zone_type_UNLOAD_ALL;
   998	            zone_sort_options.unload_corpses |= zone->get_type() == zone_type_STRIP_CORPSES;
   999	        }
  1000	    }
  1001	    return zone_sort_options;
  1002	}
  1003	
  1004	zone_items populate_items( const tripoint_bub_ms &src_bub )
  1005	{
  1006	    map &here = get_map();
  1007	    const std::optional<vpart_reference> vp = here.veh_at( src_bub ).cargo();
  1008	
  1009	    zone_items items;
  1010	    // Collect items from both vehicle cargo and ground at this tile.
  1011	    // The bool in each pair tracks whether the item is from vehicle cargo.
  1012	    if( vp ) {
  1013	        for( item &it : vp->items() ) {
  1014	            items.emplace_back( &it, true );
  1015	        }
  1016	    }
  1017	    for( item &it : here.i_at( src_bub ) ) {
  1018	        items.emplace_back( &it, false );
  1019	    }
  1020	    return items;
  1021	}
  1022	
  1023	bool ignore_contents( Character &you, const tripoint_abs_ms &src )
  1024	{
  1025	    const zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
  1026	    // check ignorable zones for ignore_contents enabled
  1027	    for( const auto &zone_type : ignorable_zone_types ) {
  1028	        // add zones using mgr.get_zones_at
  1029	        for( zone_data const *zone : mgr.get_zones_at( src, zone_type, _fac_id( you ) ) ) {
  1030	            ignorable_options const &options = dynamic_cast<const ignorable_options &>( zone->get_options() );
  1031	            if( options.get_ignore_contents() ) {
  1032	                return true;
  1033	            }
  1034	        }
  1035	    }
  1036	    return false;
  1037	}
  1038	
  1039	bool ignore_zone_position( Character &you, const tripoint_abs_ms &src,
  1040	                           bool ignore_contents )
  1041	{
  1042	    const zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
  1043	    map &here = get_map();
  1044	    const tripoint_bub_ms src_bub = here.get_bub( src );
  1045	
  1046	    return mgr.has( zone_type_LOOT_IGNORE, src, _fac_id( you ) ) ||
  1047	           ignore_contents ||
  1048	           here.get_field( src_bub, fd_fire ) != nullptr ||
  1049	           !here.can_put_items_ter_furn( src_bub ) ||
  1050	           here.impassable_field_at( src_bub );
  1051	}
  1052	
  1053	bool has_items_to_sort( Character &you, const tripoint_abs_ms &src,
  1054	                        unload_sort_options zone_unload_options,
  1055	                        const std::vector<item_location> &other_activity_items,
  1056	                        const zone_items &items, bool *pickup_failure,
  1057	                        bool *spillable_skipped )
  1058	{
  1059	    const zone_manager &mgr = zone_manager::get_manager();
  1060	    const faction_id fac_id = _fac_id( you );
  1061	    const tripoint_abs_ms &abspos = you.pos_abs();
  1062	
  1063	    *pickup_failure = false;
  1064	
  1065	    // Any UNSORTED zone at src (terrain or vehicle) makes all items at that
  1066	    // tile eligible for sorting. The terrain/vehicle distinction only matters
  1067	    // at the destination (where items get placed), not at the source.
  1068	    const bool src_has_unsorted = mgr.has( zone_type_LOOT_UNSORTED, src, fac_id );
  1069	    const bool src_has_vehicle_unsorted = mgr.has_vehicle( zone_type_LOOT_UNSORTED, src, fac_id );
  1070	
  1071	    // When grabbed cart sits on the source tile, items stay in cart cargo
  1072	    // (virtual pickup) so the player carry capacity check doesn't apply.
  1073	    bool virtual_pickup_available = false;
  1074	    if( you.is_avatar() && you.as_avatar()->get_grab_type() == object_type::VEHICLE ) {
  1075	        const tripoint_bub_ms cart_pos = you.pos_bub() + you.as_avatar()->grab_point;
  1076	        if( get_map().get_abs( cart_pos ) == src ) {
  1077	            virtual_pickup_available = get_map().veh_at( cart_pos ).cargo().has_value();
  1078	        }
  1079	    }
  1080	
  1081	    // When the grabbed cart is at a terrain-only unsorted zone (no vehicle
  1082	    // zone), it's being used for transport - don't re-sort its cargo.
  1083	    // If there IS a vehicle zone on the cart, the user explicitly wants
  1084	    // the cart's cargo sorted.
  1085	    const bool skip_cart_cargo = virtual_pickup_available && !src_has_vehicle_unsorted;
  1086	
  1087	    for( std::pair<item *, bool> it_pair : items ) {
  1088	        if( !src_has_unsorted ) {
  1089	            continue;
  1090	        }
  1091	        if( it_pair.second && skip_cart_cargo ) {
  1092	            continue;
  1093	        }
  1094	
  1095	        item *it = it_pair.first;
  1096	        const zone_type_id dest_zone_type_id = mgr.get_near_zone_type_for_item( *it, abspos,
  1097	                                               MAX_VIEW_DISTANCE, fac_id );
  1098	
  1099	        if( dest_zone_type_id == zone_type_id::NULL_ID() ) {
  1100	            continue;
  1101	        }
  1102	
  1103	        // Virtual pickup only applies to vehicle items
  1104	        if( !( virtual_pickup_available && it_pair.second ) && !you.can_add( *it ) ) {
  1105	            bool vehicle_can_hold = false;
  1106	            if( you.is_avatar() && you.as_avatar()->get_grab_type() == object_type::VEHICLE ) {
  1107	                const tripoint_bub_ms cart_pos = you.pos_bub() + you.as_avatar()->grab_point;
  1108	                if( std::optional<vpart_reference> ovp = get_map().veh_at( cart_pos ).cargo() ) {
  1109	                    // Approximation: only checks volume, not weight or other cargo constraints.
  1110	                    // If this over-reports, the empty-pickup guard in stage_do handles it.
  1111	                    vehicle_can_hold = ovp->items().free_volume() >= it->volume();
  1112	                }
  1113	            }
  1114	            if( !vehicle_can_hold ) {
  1115	                *pickup_failure = true;
  1116	                continue;
  1117	            }
  1118	        }

  2365	    const tripoint_bub_ms veh_pos = start_pos + tripoint( 2, 0, 0 );
  2366	    here.ter_set( veh_pos, ter_t_floor );
  2367	    vehicle *veh = here.add_vehicle( vehicle_prototype_test_shopping_cart,
  2368	                                     veh_pos, 0_degrees, 0, 0 );
  2369	    REQUIRE( veh != nullptr );
  2370	    for( const vpart_reference &vpr : veh->get_all_parts() ) {
  2371	        veh->set_hp( vpr.part(), vpr.part().info().durability / 2, false );
  2372	    }
  2373	
  2374	    // 20x20 VEHICLE_REPAIR zone -- 400 tiles, mostly empty
  2375	    const tripoint_abs_ms zone_start = here.get_abs( start_pos - point( 10, 10 ) );
  2376	    const tripoint_abs_ms zone_end = here.get_abs( start_pos + point( 9, 9 ) );
  2377	    zone_manager &zm = zone_manager::get_manager();
  2378	    zm.add( "Vehicle Repair", zone_type_VEHICLE_REPAIR, faction_your_followers,
  2379	            false, true, zone_start, zone_end );
  2380	
  2381	    // No repair items given -- every tile should fail check_requirements
  2382	    dummy.assign_activity( multi_vehicle_repair_activity_actor() );
  2383	
  2384	    // Turn-limited loop -- pattern from act_build_test.cpp.
  2385	    // Without the fix, this either hangs (unbounded single-frame work)
  2386	    // or exceeds the turn limit (re-scanning failed sources every turn).
  2387	    int turns = 0;
  2388	    const int max_turns = 50;
  2389	    while( ( !dummy.activity.is_null() || dummy.is_auto_moving() ) && turns < max_turns ) {
  2390	        dummy.set_moves( dummy.get_speed() );
  2391	        if( dummy.is_auto_moving() ) {
  2392	            dummy.setpos( here, here.get_bub( *dummy.destination_point ) );
  2393	            here.build_map_cache( dummy.posz() );
  2394	            dummy.start_destination_activity();
  2395	        }
  2396	        if( dummy.activity ) {
  2397	            dummy.activity.do_turn( dummy );
  2398	        }
  2399	        turns++;
  2400	    }
  2401	
  2402	    CHECK( !dummy.activity );
  2403	    // Should finish quickly -- not use all 50 turns
  2404	    CHECK( turns < max_turns );
  2405	}
  2406	
  2407	// --- Viewport lock math helpers ---
  2408	
  2409	TEST_CASE( "zone_sort_viewport_bbox", "[zones][viewport]" )
  2410	{
  2411	    using zone_sorting::viewport_bbox;
  2412	    using zone_sorting::calc_zone_bbox;
  2413	    using zone_sorting::expand_bbox;
  2414	
  2415	    SECTION( "single tile" ) {
  2416	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> tiles;
  2417	        tiles.emplace( 10, 20, 0 );
  2418	        viewport_bbox bbox = calc_zone_bbox( tiles );
  2419	        CHECK( bbox.min_corner == tripoint_abs_ms( 10, 20, 0 ) );
  2420	        CHECK( bbox.max_corner == tripoint_abs_ms( 10, 20, 0 ) );
  2421	        CHECK( bbox.centroid == tripoint_abs_ms( 10, 20, 0 ) );
  2422	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 0 );
  2423	        CHECK( bbox.height() == 0 );
  2424	    }
  2425	
  2426	    SECTION( "spread tiles" ) {
  2427	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> tiles;
  2428	        tiles.emplace( 5, 10, 0 );
  2429	        tiles.emplace( 25, 10, 0 );
  2430	        tiles.emplace( 15, 30, 0 );
  2431	        viewport_bbox bbox = calc_zone_bbox( tiles );
  2432	        CHECK( bbox.min_corner == tripoint_abs_ms( 5, 10, 0 ) );
  2433	        CHECK( bbox.max_corner == tripoint_abs_ms( 25, 30, 0 ) );
  2434	        CHECK( bbox.centroid == tripoint_abs_ms( 15, 20, 0 ) );
  2435	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 20 );
  2436	        CHECK( bbox.height() == 20 );
  2437	    }
  2438	
  2439	    SECTION( "empty set" ) {
  2440	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> tiles;
  2441	        viewport_bbox bbox = calc_zone_bbox( tiles );
  2442	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 0 );
  2443	        CHECK( bbox.height() == 0 );
  2444	    }
  2445	
  2446	    SECTION( "expand_bbox grows when tile outside" ) {
  2447	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> tiles;
  2448	        tiles.emplace( 10, 10, 0 );
  2449	        tiles.emplace( 20, 20, 0 );
  2450	        viewport_bbox bbox = calc_zone_bbox( tiles );
  2451	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 10 );
  2452	        CHECK( bbox.height() == 10 );
  2453	
  2454	        bool grew = expand_bbox( bbox, tripoint_abs_ms( 30, 20, 0 ) );
  2455	        CHECK( grew );
  2456	        CHECK( bbox.max_corner.x() == 30 );
  2457	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 20 );
  2458	        CHECK( bbox.centroid.x() == 20 );
  2459	    }
  2460	
  2461	    SECTION( "expand_bbox no-op when tile inside" ) {
  2462	        std::unordered_set<tripoint_abs_ms> tiles;
  2463	        tiles.emplace( 10, 10, 0 );
  2464	        tiles.emplace( 20, 20, 0 );
  2465	        viewport_bbox bbox = calc_zone_bbox( tiles );
  2466	
  2467	        bool grew = expand_bbox( bbox, tripoint_abs_ms( 15, 15, 0 ) );
  2468	        CHECK_FALSE( grew );
  2469	        CHECK( bbox.width() == 10 );
  2470	        CHECK( bbox.height() == 10 );
  2471	    }
  2472	}
  2473	
  2474	TEST_CASE( "zone_sort_viewport_zoom", "[zones][viewport]" )
  2475	{
  2476	    using zone_sorting::calc_target_zoom;
  2477	
  2478	    // Simulate: at zoom 16 (default), 60 tiles wide, 40 tiles tall.
  2479	    // screen_pixels_w = 60 * 16 = 960, screen_pixels_h = 40 * 16 = 640.
  2480	    const int vis_w = 60;
  2481	    const int vis_h = 40;
  2482	    const int cur_zoom = 16;
  2483	    const int saved = 16;
  2484	
  2485	    SECTION( "bbox fits at current zoom" ) {
  2486	        // 20x20 bbox + 4 padding = 24x24, fits in 60x40 at zoom 16
  2487	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 20, 20, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, saved );
  2488	        CHECK( z == 16 );
  2489	    }
  2490	
  2491	    SECTION( "bbox needs one step zoom out" ) {
  2492	        // 100x80 bbox + 4 padding = 104x84.
  2493	        // At zoom 16: 60x40 -- doesn't fit.
  2494	        // At zoom 8: 120x80 -- width fits (120>=104), height doesn't (80<84).
  2495	        // At zoom 4: 240x160 -- fits.
  2496	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 100, 80, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, saved );
  2497	        CHECK( z == 4 );
  2498	    }
  2499	
  2500	    SECTION( "bbox needs moderate zoom out" ) {
  2501	        // 80x30 bbox + 4 = 84x34.
  2502	        // At zoom 16: 60x40 -- width doesn't fit.
  2503	        // At zoom 8: 120x80 -- fits.
  2504	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 80, 30, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, saved );
  2505	        CHECK( z == 8 );
  2506	    }
  2507	
  2508	    SECTION( "clamp at minimum zoom 4" ) {
  2509	        // Huge bbox that doesn't even fit at zoom 4
  2510	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 1000, 1000, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, saved );
  2511	        CHECK( z == 4 );
  2512	    }
  2513	
  2514	    SECTION( "never zoom in beyond saved_zoom" ) {
  2515	        // Small bbox that fits at zoom 32, but saved_zoom is 16
  2516	        // 5x5 bbox + 4 = 9x9. At zoom 32: 30x20 -- fits. But saved=16 caps it.
  2517	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 5, 5, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, saved );
  2518	        CHECK( z == 16 );
  2519	    }
  2520	
  2521	    SECTION( "respects higher saved_zoom" ) {
  2522	        // If player was at zoom 32 (zoomed in), saved_zoom=32
  2523	        // 5x5 bbox + 4 = 9x9. At zoom 32: 30x20 -- fits.
  2524	        int z = calc_target_zoom( 5, 5, vis_w, vis_h, cur_zoom, 32 );
  2525	        CHECK( z == 32 );
  2526	    }
  2527	}
  2528

str_replace_editor str_replace /testbed/src/activity_actor.cpp   --old_str 'void zone_sort_activity_actor::do_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you )
{
    update_other_activity_items();
    // Save viewport state before base call. For NPCs, revert_after_activity()
    // replaces the activity and destroys this actor before returning.
    const bool had_viewport = viewport_was_active;
    const int saved_zoom = viewport_saved_zoom;
    zone_activity_actor::do_turn( act, you );

    // True completion: activity nulled AND no auto-move destination pending.
    // route_to_destination sets destination before nulling; true end does not.
    // Use saved locals since this may be destroyed.
    if( act.is_null() && !you.has_destination() && had_viewport ) {
        if( !test_mode ) {
            g->set_zoom( saved_zoom );
            g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
        }
        if( you.is_avatar() ) {
            you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport = {};
        }
    }
}
' --new_str 'void zone_sort_activity_actor::do_turn( player_activity &act, Character &you )
{
    update_other_activity_items();
    // Save viewport state before base call. For NPCs, revert_after_activity()
    // replaces the activity and destroys this actor before returning.
    const bool had_viewport = viewport_was_active;
    const int saved_zoom = viewport_saved_zoom;
    zone_activity_actor::do_turn( act, you );

    // True completion: activity nulled AND no auto-move destination pending.
    // route_to_destination sets destination before nulling; true end does not.
    // If sorting activates the viewport and then immediately finds no work
    // (for example: items are outside UNSORTED, or no destination zone matches),
    // had_viewport is still false because it was captured before stage_init().
    // In that case, the avatar viewport flag is the safe signal that there is a
    // newly-created lock to clear.
    const bool active_avatar_viewport = you.is_avatar() &&
                                        you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport.active;
    if( act.is_null() && !you.has_destination() && ( had_viewport || active_avatar_viewport ) ) {
        if( !test_mode ) {
            g->set_zoom( had_viewport ? saved_zoom : viewport_saved_zoom );
            g->mark_main_ui_adaptor_resize();
        }
        if( you.is_avatar() ) {
            you.as_avatar()->zone_sort_viewport = {};
        }
    }
}
'
